word: G4186 - πολύτιμος - polýtimos - pol-oot'-ee-mos - Very costly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πολύτιμος

- Transliteration: Polutimos

- Phonetic: pol-oot'-ee-mos

- Definition:

1. very valuable, of great price

- Origin: from G4183 and G5092

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G4183 and G5092; extremely valuable: - very costly of great price.
